title: Can I mirror a subitem to another subitem on the same board?

posts.author: livsmarinho (Livia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m working on creating a project plan template for my team in Monday.com. One of the projects includes a task with subitems that will be unique for each project. I need these subitems to be mirrored in another task within the same group.

Is there a way to set this up so that:

  1. The subitems from one task are mirrored in another task within the same group?
  2. Any updates made to the subitems in the first task(e.g., status changes, text updates) are automatically reflected in the mirrored task?

I would appreciate any advice or suggestions on how to achieve this. Thanks in advance!
